name: Chest (Pectoralis Major)

landmarks.notes: Model-based estimate of weekly hard sets, not a measured constant. Individualize from your own response. Includes only direct/near-direct chest work; heavy pressing already loads the chest.

frequency_notes: Train ~2x/week to distribute volume across incline and flat pressing plus a fly variation.
training_notes: Cover both heads: incline work biases the clavicular head, flat/decline the sternal head. Include a lengthened-position movement (deep dumbbell press or fly).
